ADMIN_ANNOUNCEMENT:

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;

public class Admin_Announce extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Admin_Announce
     */
    public Admin_Announce() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                                 

    private void con_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        String announcementText = jTextArea1.getText();
    String selectedUserType = user_type.getSelectedItem().toString();

    if (!announcementText.isEmpty()) {
        try {
            Connection con = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7");

            // Insert into the appropriate table based on the user type (Players or Teams)
            String insertQuery = "";
            if (selectedUserType.equals("Players")) {
                insertQuery = "INSERT INTO player_announcements (announcement_text) VALUES (?)";
            } else if (selectedUserType.equals("Teams")) {
                insertQuery = "INSERT INTO team_announcements (announcement_text) VALUES (?)";
            }

            PreparedStatement ps = con.prepareStatement(insertQuery);
            ps.setString(1, announcementText);
            ps.executeUpdate();

            // Clear the text area after sending the announcement
            jTextArea1.setText("");

            // Close the connection and statement
            ps.close();
            con.close();

            // Optionally, show a success message
            javax.swing.JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Announcement sent to " + selectedUserType + " successfully!");

        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            javax.swing.JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error occurred while sending the announcement.");
        }
    } else {
        // Show a message if the announcement text is empty
        javax.swing.JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Announcement text cannot be empty.");
    }
    }                                       

    private void backActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Main_Page().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                                     
}


COMPLETION OF INDIVIDUAL GAME :

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.logging.Level;
import java.util.logging.Logger;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
import javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel;
public class Complete_Indiv_game extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    private static final String URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe"; // Update with your database URL
    private static final String USERNAME = "system"; // Update with your database username
    private static final String PASSWORD = "cristianosui7";
    public Complete_Indiv_game() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                             

    private void pl_secActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                       
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                      

    private void check_plActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        String selectedGame = (String) game_sel.getSelectedItem();
        String sel_game_id = game_id_field.getText();
        DefaultTableModel model = (DefaultTableModel) show_pl.getModel(); 
    model.setRowCount(0); 
        
        if (selectedGame != null && !selectedGame.isEmpty()) {
        try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD);
             PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT PARTICIPANT_ID,USERNAME FROM GAME_PARTICIPANTS WHERE GAME_ID = ?")){
            ps.setString(1, sel_game_id);
            ResultSet rs = ps.executeQuery();
            
            while (rs.next()) {
                String par_id = rs.getString("PARTICIPANT_ID");
                String user_id = rs.getString("USERNAME");
                model.addRow(new Object[]{par_id,user_id});
            }
            rs.close();
            ps.close();
            conn.close();
            
        }   catch (SQLException ex) {
                Logger.getLogger(Complete_Indiv_game.class.getName()).log(Level.SEVERE, null, ex);
            }
        }
        else
        {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please select the required fields.");
        }
        
    }                                        

    private void con_resActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
      String p_first = pl_first.getText();   // First place participant
    String p_second = pl_sec.getText();    // Second place participant
    String p_third = pl_thi.getText();     // Third place participant
    String gameId = game_id_field.getText();  // Game ID
    String sportType = (String) game_sel.getSelectedItem();  // Sport Type

    // Points for first, second, third places
    int pointsFirst = 10;
    int pointsSecond = 5;
    int pointsThird = 3;

    // Validate input fields
    if (p_first != null && !p_first.isEmpty() && 
        p_second != null && !p_second.isEmpty() && 
        p_third != null && !p_third.isEmpty() && 
        gameId != null && !gameId.isEmpty()) {

        // Insert results into the database and store points
        try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD)) {
            
            // Insert results into individual_game_results table
            String insertGameResultsSQL = "INSERT INTO individual_game_results (GAME_ID, SPORT_TYPE, FIRST, SECOND, THIRD) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)";
            try (PreparedStatement psGameResults = conn.prepareStatement(insertGameResultsSQL)) {
                psGameResults.setString(1, gameId);  // Game ID
                psGameResults.setString(2, sportType);  // Sport Type
                psGameResults.setString(3, p_first); // First place participant
                psGameResults.setString(4, p_second); // Second place participant
                psGameResults.setString(5, p_third); // Third place participant
                
                int rowsAffected = psGameResults.executeUpdate();
                if (rowsAffected > 0) {
                    JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Results have been successfully saved.");
                } else {
                    JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Failed to save results.");
                }
            }

            // Upsert points for first, second, and third place participants including sport_type
            String upsertPointsSQL = "MERGE INTO player_points pp " +
                                      "USING (SELECT ? AS player_name, ? AS game_id, ? AS points, ? AS sport_type FROM dual) incoming " +
                                      "ON (pp.PLAYER_NAME = incoming.player_name AND pp.GAME_ID = incoming.game_id AND pp.SPORT_TYPE = incoming.sport_type) " +
                                      "WHEN MATCHED THEN " +
                                      "UPDATE SET pp.POINTS = pp.POINTS + incoming.points " +
                                      "WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN " +
                                      "INSERT (pp.PLAYER_NAME, pp.GAME_ID, pp.POINTS, pp.SPORT_TYPE) " +
                                      "VALUES (incoming.player_name, incoming.game_id, incoming.points, incoming.sport_type)";

            try (PreparedStatement psPlayerPoints = conn.prepareStatement(upsertPointsSQL)) {
                // Upsert points for 1st place
                psPlayerPoints.setString(1, p_first);  // Player Name
                psPlayerPoints.setString(2, gameId);   // Game ID
                psPlayerPoints.setInt(3, pointsFirst); // Points (10 for 1st)
                psPlayerPoints.setString(4, sportType); // Sport Type
                psPlayerPoints.executeUpdate();
                
                // Upsert points for 2nd place
                psPlayerPoints.setString(1, p_second); // Player Name
                psPlayerPoints.setString(2, gameId);   // Game ID
                psPlayerPoints.setInt(3, pointsSecond); // Points (5 for 2nd)
                psPlayerPoints.setString(4, sportType); // Sport Type
                psPlayerPoints.executeUpdate();
                
                // Upsert points for 3rd place
                psPlayerPoints.setString(1, p_third);  // Player Name
                psPlayerPoints.setString(2, gameId);   // Game ID
                psPlayerPoints.setInt(3, pointsThird); // Points (3 for 3rd)
                psPlayerPoints.setString(4, sportType); // Sport Type
                psPlayerPoints.executeUpdate();
            }

        } catch (SQLException ex) {
            Logger.getLogger(Complete_Indiv_game.class.getName()).log(Level.SEVERE, null, ex);
        }
    } else {
        // Show error message if fields are not filled
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please fill in all the fields (First, Second, Third, Game ID).");
    }
    }                                       

    private void jButton1ActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Create_Game().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                                         
}

COMPLETION OF TEAM GAME : 

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
public class Complete_Team_game extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    private static final String URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe"; // Update with your database URL
    private static final String USERNAME = "system"; // Update with your database username
    private static final String PASSWORD = "cristianosui7";
    public Complete_Team_game() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                                  

    private void check_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                          
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        String selectedGame = (String) game_sel.getSelectedItem();
        String sel_game_id = game_id_field.getText();

    if (selectedGame != null && !selectedGame.isEmpty()) {
        try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD);
             PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT TEAM1_ID, TEAM2_ID FROM games_team WHERE GAME_NAME = ? AND GAME_ID = ?")) {
            ps.setString(1, selectedGame);
            ps.setString(2,sel_game_id);
            ResultSet rs = ps.executeQuery();

            if (rs.next()) {
                String team1 = rs.getString("TEAM1_ID");
                String team2 = rs.getString("TEAM2_ID");
                
                // Set the team names in the radio buttons
                t1.setText(team1);
                t2.setText(team2);
                
                t1.setVisible(true);
                t2.setVisible(true);
            } else {
                JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "No teams found for the selected game.");
            }

        } catch (SQLException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error fetching teams: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    } else {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please select a game to view teams.");
    }
    }                                         

    private void res_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
        String selectedGame = (String) game_sel.getSelectedItem();
    String sel_game_id = game_id_field.getText();
    String team1 = t1.getText();
    String team2 = t2.getText();
    String winner = t1.isSelected() ? team1 : t2.isSelected() ? team2 : "";
    String loser = winner.equals(team1) ? team2 : team1;

    if (!winner.isEmpty()) {
        try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD)) {

            // Insert game results
            try (PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("INSERT INTO game_results (GAME_ID, TEAM1, TEAM2, WINNER, LOSER) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)")) {
                ps.setString(1, sel_game_id);
                ps.setString(2, team1);
                ps.setString(3, team2);
                ps.setString(4, winner);
                ps.setString(5, loser);
                ps.executeUpdate();
            }

            // Update points for the winning team
            updateTeamPoints(conn, winner, 5);  // Add 5 points to winner
            updateTeamPoints(conn, loser, 0);   // No points for loser

            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Results confirmed! Winner: " + winner);
            new Finish_Game().setVisible(true);
            this.dispose();

            // Clear selection
            t1.setSelected(false);
            t2.setSelected(false);

        } catch (SQLException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error storing result: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    } else {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please select a winner.");
    }
    }                                       

    
    private void updateTeamPoints(Connection conn, String teamId, int pointsToAdd) throws SQLException {
    try (PreparedStatement psCheck = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT POINTS FROM team_points WHERE TEAM_ID = ?")) {
        psCheck.setString(1, teamId);
        ResultSet rs = psCheck.executeQuery();

        if (rs.next()) {
            // Team exists, update points
            int currentPoints = rs.getInt("POINTS");
            int newPoints = currentPoints + pointsToAdd;
            try (PreparedStatement psUpdate = conn.prepareStatement("UPDATE team_points SET POINTS = ? WHERE TEAM_ID = ?")) {
                psUpdate.setInt(1, newPoints);
                psUpdate.setString(2, teamId);
                psUpdate.executeUpdate();
            }
        } else {
            // Team does not exist, insert new record
            try (PreparedStatement psInsert = conn.prepareStatement("INSERT INTO team_points (TEAM_ID, POINTS) VALUES (?, ?)")) {
                psInsert.setString(1, teamId);
                psInsert.setInt(2, pointsToAdd);
                psInsert.executeUpdate();
            }
        }
    }
}
 }

CONTACT US :

CREATE INDIVIDUAL GAME : 


package sgms;

import java.util.Calendar;
import java.util.Date;
import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;

public class Create_I_G extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Create_I_G
     */
    public Create_I_G() {
        initComponents();
        setSelectableDateLimits();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                          
    
    private void setSelectableDateLimits() {
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        Date today = cal.getTime(); // Get today's date
        date_choose.setMinSelectableDate(today); // Prevent selecting past dates
        date_choose.setMaxSelectableDate(null); // Allow selection of any future date
    }

    private boolean validateParticipants() {
    String participantText = part_count.getText().trim();
    
    // Check if the input is empty
    if (participantText.isEmpty()) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please enter the number of participants.", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return false;
    }
    
    // Check if the input is an integer
    try {
        int participants = Integer.parseInt(participantText);
        
        // Check if the number is greater than 0
        if (participants <= 0 ) {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Number of participants must be greater than 0 or 1.", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
            return false;
        }
    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please enter a valid integer.", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return false;
    }
    
    return true;
}

    
    private void con_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
       if (!validateParticipants()) {
        return; // Exit the method if validation fails
    }
    
    String gameID = game_id.getText();
    String gameName = sports_type.getSelectedItem().toString();
    String gameVenue = venue.getSelectedItem().toString();
    Date gameDate = date_choose.getDate(); // Get date from JDateChooser
    String sportType = sports_type.getSelectedItem().toString(); // Assume you have a dropdown for this
    
    // Get and validate number of participants
    int participants = Integer.parseInt(part_count.getText().trim());

    // Validate other inputs
    if (gameID.isEmpty() || gameDate == null || sportType.isEmpty()) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please fill all required fields!", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return;
    }
    
    // Format the date
    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
    String formattedDate = sdf.format(gameDate);
    
    // Insert into the database
    Connection conn = null;
    PreparedStatement ps = null;
    try {
        // Establish database connection
        conn = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7");
        
        // Prepare the SQL insert statement
        String sql = "INSERT INTO individual_games (GAME_ID, GAME_NAME, VENUE, GAME_DATE, NO_OF_PARTICIPANTS, MAX_PARTICIPANTS, SPORT_TYPE) " + 
             "VALUES (?, ?, ?, TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ?, ?, ?)";

        ps = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
        
        // Set parameters
        ps.setString(1, gameID);
        ps.setString(2, gameName);
        ps.setString(3, gameVenue);
        ps.setString(4, formattedDate);  // Date is passed as a string
        ps.setInt(5, participants);
        ps.setInt(6, 0); // Set MAX_PARTICIPANTS to 0
        ps.setString(7, sportType);
                        
        
        // Execute the insert
        int rowsInserted = ps.executeUpdate();
        if (rowsInserted > 0) {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Game created successfully!", "Success", JOptionPane.INFORMATION_MESSAGE);
        }
    } catch (SQLException ex) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error while creating the game: " + ex.getMessage(), "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        ex.printStackTrace();
    } finally {
        // Clean up database resources
        try {
            if (ps != null) ps.close();
            if (conn != null) conn.close();
        } catch (SQLException ex) {
            ex.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
    }                                       

    private void backMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                  
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Create_Game().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                 

    private void part_countActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                           
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                          

    private void game_idActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                                         
}

CREATE TEAM GAME : 

package sgms;

import javax.swing.*;
import com.toedter.calendar.JDateChooser;
import java.util.Calendar;
import java.util.Date;
import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.SQLException;


public class Create_T_G extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Create_T_G
     */
    public Create_T_G() {
        initComponents();
        setSelectableDateLimits();
        
    }
     private void setSelectableDateLimits() {
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        Date today = cal.getTime(); // Get today's date
        date_choose.setMinSelectableDate(today); // Prevent selecting past dates
        date_choose.setMaxSelectableDate(null); // Allow selection of any future date
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                                

    private void con_gameActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        String selectedGame = game_sel.getSelectedItem().toString();
    String selectedVenue = gam_ven.getSelectedItem().toString();
    Date selectedDate = date_choose.getDate();
    String gameId = g_id.getText();

    // Convert the date to a SQL format
    java.sql.Date sqlDate = new java.sql.Date(selectedDate.getTime());

    // SQL query to insert a new game record with empty team names
    String insertQuery = "INSERT INTO games_team (game_id, game_name, venue, game_date, team1_ID, team2_ID) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, '', '')";

    try {
        // Establish connection
        Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7");
        PreparedStatement pstmt = conn.prepareStatement(insertQuery);
        
        // Set the parameters
        pstmt.setString(1, gameId);
        pstmt.setString(2, selectedGame);
        pstmt.setString(3, selectedVenue);
        pstmt.setDate(4, sqlDate);

        // Execute the insert
        int rowsInserted = pstmt.executeUpdate();
        if (rowsInserted > 0) {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Game created successfully!");
        }

        // Close the resources
        pstmt.close();
        conn.close();
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error occurred while creating game: " + e.getMessage());
    }
    }                                        

    private void g_idActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                    

    private void jLabel6MouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Create_Game().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                    

    private void game_selActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                                         
}

}

LOGIN PAGE : 


package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
public class Login_Page extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Login_Page
     */
    public Login_Page() {
        initComponents();
    }
    
    public boolean login(String username, String password, String role) {
    String tableName = "";
    switch (role) {
        case "Admin":
            tableName = "admins";
            break;
        case "Player":
            tableName = "players";
            break;
        case "Team":
            tableName = "teams_SGMS";
            break;
        case "User":
            tableName = "users_spectators";
            break;
        default:
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Invalid role selected!");
            return false; // Exit if the role is not valid
    }

    try (Connection con = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7")) {
        String sql = "SELECT * FROM " + tableName + " WHERE username = ? AND password = ?";
        try (PreparedStatement pstmt = con.prepareStatement(sql)) {
            pstmt.setString(1, username);
            pstmt.setString(2, password);
            ResultSet rs = pstmt.executeQuery();

            if (rs.next()) { // If a record is found
                UserSession.getInstance().setRole(role); // Store the role
                UserSession.getInstance().setUsername(username);
                return true; // Login successful
            } else {
                JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Invalid username or password!");
                return false; // Login failed
            }
        }
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Database error: " + e.getMessage());
        return false; // Login failed due to database error
    }
}                                             

    private void submitActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                       
     String selectedRole = (String) acc_type.getSelectedItem();
        String username = user_name.getText();
        char[] passwordArray = pass.getPassword();
        String password = new String(passwordArray);

        boolean loginSuccessful = login(username, password, selectedRole);
        if (loginSuccessful) {
            switch (selectedRole) {
                case "Admin":
                    new Main_Page().setVisible(true);
                    this.dispose();
                    break;
                case "User":
                    new Main_Page_3().setVisible(true);
                    this.dispose();
                    break;
                case "Player":
                    new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);
                    this.dispose();
                    break;
                case "Team":
                    new Main_Page_2().setVisible(true);
                    this.dispose();
                    break;
            }
        }
    }                                      

    private void jButton1ActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Welcome().setVisible(true);
            this.dispose();
    }                                                         
}

MAIN PAGE : 


package sgms;

import java.awt.event.MouseAdapter;
import java.awt.event.MouseEvent;
import java.awt.event.MouseListener;
import javax.swing.JLabel;

/**
 *
 * @author VICTUS
 */
public class Main_Page extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Main_Page
     */
    public Main_Page() {
        initComponents();
        
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                         
    
    private void acc_user_detMouseEntered(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                          
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        UserSession session = UserSession.getInstance();
    String role = session.getRole();
    
    // Assuming the username is part of the session as well
    String username = session.getUsername(); // Replace this with the actual method to get the username, if available

    // Display the username and role on the account label when the mouse hovers over it
    acc_user_det.setText("" + username + " " + role);
    }                                         

    private void acc_user_detMouseExited(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        acc_user_det.setText("ACCOUNT");
    }                                        

    private void jPanel5MouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Login_Page().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                    

    private void homeMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                  
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Main_Page().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                 

    private void team_lMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                    
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Teams_Vw().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                   

    private void player_vMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                      
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Player_View().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                     

    private void contact_lMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                       
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Contact().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                      

    private void ad_finishMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                       
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        if (!ad_finish.isEnabled()) {
            return;  // Exit early if the label is disabled
        }
        new Finish_Game().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                      

    private void ad_createMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                       
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        if (!ad_create.isEnabled()) {
            return;  // Exit early if the label is disabled
        }
        new Create_Game().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                      

    private void ad_analzyeMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                        
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Manage_SGMS().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
        
    }                                       

    private void ad_announceMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Admin_Announce().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
        
    }                                                         
}

PLAYER MESSAGES : 

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;

public class Player_Messages extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Player_Messages
     */
    public Player_Messages() {
        initComponents();
         loadPlayerMessages();
         mess_field.setEditable(false);
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                          
    private void backActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                    

    private void loadPlayerMessages() {
        String DB_URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe";
        String DB_USER = "system";
        String DB_PASS = "cristianosui7";

        try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(DB_URL, DB_USER, DB_PASS)) {
            // Query to fetch announcements from the player_announcements table
            String sql = "SELECT announcement_text FROM player_announcements";
            PreparedStatement stmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
            ResultSet rs = stmt.executeQuery();

            StringBuilder messages = new StringBuilder();

            // Append each announcement to the StringBuilder
            while (rs.next()) {
                String announcement = rs.getString("announcement_text");
                messages.append(announcement).append("\n\n");
            }

            // If no messages, display a message saying there are no announcements
            if (messages.length() == 0) {
                messages.append("No announcements available.");
            }

            // Set the messages in the text area
            mess_field.setText(messages.toString());

        } catch (SQLException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            mess_field.setText("Error loading messages.");
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @param args the command line arguments
     */                 
}

PLAYER RESULTS : 

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
import java.util.Date;
import javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel;



public class Player_Results extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Player_Results
     */
    public Player_Results() {
        initComponents();
        loadPlayerResults();
        result_area.setEditable(false);
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                          
    private void backActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                    

    private void loadPlayerResults() {
    // Database connection details
    String DB_URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe";
    String DB_USER = "system";
    String DB_PASS = "cristianosui7";

    // Get the current player's username from the session (this should be passed to this method)
    UserSession session = UserSession.getInstance();
    String username = session.getUsername(); // Replace with actual username if stored differently

    try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(DB_URL, DB_USER, DB_PASS)) {
        // SQL query to fetch the results for the player
        String sql = "SELECT ig.game_date, ig.venue, ig.sport_type, "
                   + "CASE "
                   + "WHEN igr.first = ? THEN '1st' "
                   + "WHEN igr.second = ? THEN '2nd' "
                   + "WHEN igr.third = ? THEN '3rd' "
                   + "ELSE 'Not Ranked' "
                   + "END AS position "
                   + "FROM individual_games ig "
                   + "JOIN game_participants gp ON ig.game_id = gp.game_id "
                   + "LEFT JOIN individual_game_results igr ON ig.game_id = igr.game_id "
                   + "WHERE gp.username = ?";

        // Prepare statement
        PreparedStatement stmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
        stmt.setString(1, username); // Player's username for first place check
        stmt.setString(2, username); // Player's username for second place check
        stmt.setString(3, username); // Player's username for third place check
        stmt.setString(4, username); // Player's username in the game_participants table

        ResultSet rs = stmt.executeQuery();

        // Prepare a StringBuilder to store the results
        StringBuilder results = new StringBuilder();

        // Process the result set and display in the text area
        while (rs.next()) {
            String gameDate = rs.getString("game_date");
            String venue = rs.getString("venue");
            String sportType = rs.getString("sport_type");
            String position = rs.getString("position");

            results.append("Game Date: ").append(gameDate)
                   .append("\nVenue: ").append(venue)
                   .append("\nSport: ").append(sportType)
                   .append("\nPosition: ").append(position)
                   .append("\n\n");
        }

        // If no results, inform the player
        if (results.length() == 0) {
            results.append("You haven't participated in any games or have not been ranked yet.");
        }

        // Set the results in the text area
        result_area.setText(results.toString());

    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
        result_area.setText("Error retrieving results.");
    }
}

                  
}

PLAYER VIEW : 


package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
import java.util.Date;
import javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel;

public class Player_View extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Player_View
     */
    public Player_View() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                              

    private void show_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
       String selectedSport = sports_type.getSelectedItem().toString(); // Get the selected sport
        DefaultTableModel model = (DefaultTableModel) show_pl.getModel();
        model.setRowCount(0); // Clear existing rows

        try {
            // Database connection details
            String DB_URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe";
            String DB_USER = "system";
            String DB_PASS = "cristianosui7";

            Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(DB_URL, DB_USER, DB_PASS);

            // Query to fetch the schedule for the selected sport
            String query = "SELECT PLAYER_NAME,AGE " +
            "FROM players " +
            "WHERE SPORT_TYPE = ?";

            PreparedStatement pstmt = conn.prepareStatement(query);
            pstmt.setString(1, selectedSport); // Set the selected sport
            ResultSet rs = pstmt.executeQuery();

            // Populate the table with the fetched data
            while (rs.next()) {
                String pl_name = rs.getString("player_name");
                String pl_age = rs.getString("age");
                model.addRow(new Object[]{pl_name, pl_age});
            }

            rs.close();
            pstmt.close();
            conn.close();
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }                                        

    private void team_lMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                    
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Teams_Vw().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                   

    private void homeMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                  
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        UserSession session = UserSession.getInstance();
        String role = session.getRole();
        
        switch(role)
        {
            case "Admin":
                new Main_Page().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;
            case "User":
                new Main_Page_3().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;
            case "Player":
                new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;
            case "Team":
                new Main_Page_2().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;    
        }
    }                                 

    private void contact_lMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                       
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Contact().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                      

    private void player_vMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                      
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Player_View().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                     

    /**
     * @param args the command line arguments
     */                
}

REGISTER INDIV GAME : 


package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;

public class Register_Indiv_Game extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    private static final String URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe"; // Update with your database URL
    private static final String USERNAME = "system"; // Update with your database username
    private static final String PASSWORD = "cristianosui7"; // Update with your database password
    public Register_Indiv_Game() {
        initComponents();
        loadSports();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                          
                          
private void loadSports() {
    String username = UserSession.getInstance().getUsername();
    String sportType = ""; // To hold the sport type of the user

    // Retrieve the sport type for the logged-in user
    try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD);
         PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT SPORT_TYPE FROM players WHERE USERNAME = ?")) {
        ps.setString(1, username);
        ResultSet rs = ps.executeQuery();

        if (rs.next()) {
            sportType = rs.getString("SPORT_TYPE");
            System.out.println("Retrieved sport type: " + sportType);  // Debugging line
        }
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
    }

    // Load games based on the player's sport type
    try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD);
         PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement(
             "SELECT GAME_ID, GAME_NAME, VENUE, TO_CHAR(GAME_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GAME_DATE " +
             "FROM individual_games WHERE SPORT_TYPE = ?")) {
        
        ps.setString(1, sportType);
        ResultSet rs = ps.executeQuery();
        
        boolean gamesFound = false;
        while (rs.next()) {
            // Retrieve game details
            String gameName = rs.getString("GAME_NAME");
            String venue = rs.getString("VENUE");
            String gameDate = rs.getString("GAME_DATE"); // formatted as 'YYYY-MM-DD'
            
            // Format game details and add to combo box
            String gameDetails = gameName + " | " + venue + " | " + gameDate;
            sports_combo.addItem(gameDetails);
            
            gamesFound = true;
        }
        
        if (!gamesFound) {
            System.out.println("No games found for sport type: " + sportType);
        }
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
    }
}


    private void con_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
    String selectedGame = (String) sports_combo.getSelectedItem();
    String username = UserSession.getInstance().getUsername();

    // Retrieve the GAME_ID for the selected game
    String gameId = "";
    
    if (selectedGame != null && !selectedGame.isEmpty()) {
        // Extract game details from the selected game (assuming combo box item is in the format: "GameName | Venue | Date")
        String[] gameDetails = selectedGame.split(" \\| ");
        String gameName = gameDetails[0];
        String venue = gameDetails[1];
        String gameDate = gameDetails[2];

        System.out.println("Selected game name: " + gameName); 
        System.out.println("Selected venue: " + venue); 
        System.out.println("Selected date: " + gameDate); 

        // Fetch the GAME_ID based on the game name, venue, and date
        try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD);
             PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT GAME_ID, NO_OF_PARTICIPANTS, MAX_PARTICIPANTS FROM individual_games WHERE GAME_NAME = ? AND VENUE = ? AND GAME_DATE = TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD')")) {
            ps.setString(1, gameName);
            ps.setString(2, venue);
            ps.setString(3, gameDate);
            ResultSet rs = ps.executeQuery();

            int totalCapacity = 0;  // Total number of participants allowed
            int currentParticipants = 0;  // Current registered participants

            if (rs.next()) {
                gameId = rs.getString("GAME_ID");
                totalCapacity = rs.getInt("NO_OF_PARTICIPANTS");  // Get total capacity (entered by admin)
                currentParticipants = rs.getInt("MAX_PARTICIPANTS");  // Get current registered participants
                System.out.println("Retrieved GAME_ID: " + gameId);
                System.out.println("Current participants: " + currentParticipants + " / Total capacity: " + totalCapacity);
            } else {
                System.out.println("No GAME_ID found for game: " + gameName); 
            }
            
            // Ensure there is still space for a new participant
            if (currentParticipants < totalCapacity) {
                // Proceed only if a valid GAME_ID was found
                if (gameId != null && !gameId.isEmpty()) {
                    // Check if the player is already registered for the selected game
                    boolean isAlreadyRegistered = false;
                    try (PreparedStatement psCheck = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT * FROM game_participants WHERE GAME_ID = ? AND USERNAME = ?")) {
                        psCheck.setString(1, gameId);
                        psCheck.setString(2, username);
                        ResultSet rsCheck = psCheck.executeQuery();

                        if (rsCheck.next()) {
                            isAlreadyRegistered = true;
                        }
                    } catch (SQLException e) {
                        e.printStackTrace();
                    }

                    if (isAlreadyRegistered) {
                        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "You are already registered for this game!");
                    } else {
                        // Register the player for the game and update the participant count
                        try (PreparedStatement psInsert = conn.prepareStatement("INSERT INTO game_participants (GAME_ID, USERNAME) VALUES (?, ?)")) {
                            psInsert.setString(1, gameId);  
                            psInsert.setString(2, username);  
                            psInsert.executeUpdate();
                            System.out.println("Successfully inserted participant with GAME_ID: " + gameId);

                            // Update current registered participant count (MAX_PARTICIPANTS)
                            try (PreparedStatement updatePs = conn.prepareStatement("UPDATE individual_games SET MAX_PARTICIPANTS = MAX_PARTICIPANTS + 1 WHERE GAME_ID = ?")) {
                                updatePs.setString(1, gameId);
                                updatePs.executeUpdate();
                                System.out.println("Participant count updated for GAME_ID: " + gameId);
                            }

                            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Successfully registered for the game!");
                            
                            // Navigate to the main page
                            new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);
                            this.dispose();
                        } catch (SQLException e) {
                            e.printStackTrace();
                            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error registering for the game: " + e.getMessage());
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Could not register for the game. No valid GAME_ID found.");
                }
            } else {
                // If the participant count has reached the total capacity, show an error message
                JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Registration closed. Maximum number of participants reached.");
            }

        } catch (SQLException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    } else {
        System.out.println("No game selected from combo box!");
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please select a game to register.");
    }
    }                                       

    private void con_btn1ActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
       new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);  
       this.dispose();
    }                                                          
}

REMOVE PLAYER : 

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;

public class Remove_Players extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form Remove_Players
     */
    public Remove_Players() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                                 

    private void player_labActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                           
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                          

    private void jLabel4MouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Manage_SGMS().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                    

    private void con_btnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                        
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        String sportType = sports_type.getSelectedItem().toString(); 
    String playerId = player_lab.getText();
    
    // Database connection variables
    Connection conn = null;
    PreparedStatement pstmt = null;
    
    try {
        // Load the database driver (for example, Oracle JDBC Driver)
        Class.forName("oracle.jdbc.driver.OracleDriver");
        
        // Establish the connection
        conn = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7");
        
        // Create the SQL DELETE statement
        String sql = "DELETE FROM players WHERE USERNAME = ? AND SPORT_TYPE = ?";
        
        // Prepare the statement
        pstmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
        pstmt.setString(1, playerId);
        pstmt.setString(2, sportType);
        
        // Execute the delete operation
        int rowsAffected = pstmt.executeUpdate();
        
        // Check if the deletion was successful
        if (rowsAffected > 0) {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Player removed successfully.");
        } else {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "No player found with the provided ID and sport type.");
        }
        
    } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Database driver not found.");
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Error while connecting to the database.");
    } finally {
        // Close resources
        try {
            if (pstmt != null) pstmt.close();
            if (conn != null) conn.close();
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
        
        
    }                                       


        /* Create and display the form */
        java.awt.EventQueue.invokeLater(new Runnable() {
            public void run() {
                new Remove_Players().setVisible(true);
            }
        });
    }                 
}


SIGN UP : 


package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.Arrays;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;

public class Sign_Up_player extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    private static final String DB_URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe"; 
    private static final String USER = "system"; 
    private static final String PASSWORD = "cristianosui7";
    
    public Sign_Up_player() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                          
    
    private void submitActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                       
    
        char[] passwordChars = pass.getPassword();
char[] confirmPasswordChars = con_pass.getPassword();
        
    String playerName = pl_name.getText();
    String username = user.getText();
    String passwordText = new String(passwordChars);
    String confirmPassword = new String(confirmPasswordChars);
    String emailText = email.getText();
    String phoneNumber = ph_no.getText();
    String ageText = age.getText();
    String sportType = (String) sports_type.getSelectedItem();

    // Validate input (you can add more validation as needed)
    if (playerName.isEmpty() || username.isEmpty() || passwordText.isEmpty() ||
            confirmPassword.isEmpty() || emailText.isEmpty() || phoneNumber.isEmpty() || ageText.isEmpty()) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Please fill all fields", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return;
    }

    if (!passwordText.equals(confirmPassword)) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Passwords do not match", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return;
    }
    Arrays.fill(passwordChars, '0');
    Arrays.fill(confirmPasswordChars, '0');

    // Validate age
    int ageValue;
    try {
        ageValue = Integer.parseInt(ageText);
        if (ageValue < 0) {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Age must be a non-negative number", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
            return;
        }
    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Age must be a valid integer", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return;
    }

    // Validate email
    if (!emailText.endsWith("@gmail.com")) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Email must end with @gmail.com", "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
        return;
    }

    // Database connection and insert logic
    try (Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(DB_URL, USER, PASSWORD)) {
        String sql = "INSERT INTO players (player_name, username, password, email, phone_number, age, sport_type) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)";
        PreparedStatement pstmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
        pstmt.setString(1, playerName);
        pstmt.setString(2, username);
        pstmt.setString(3, passwordText);
        pstmt.setString(4, emailText);
        pstmt.setString(5, phoneNumber);
        pstmt.setInt(6, ageValue); // Store age as an integer
        pstmt.setString(7, sportType);
        pstmt.executeUpdate();

        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Registration successful!", "Success", JOptionPane.INFORMATION_MESSAGE);
        // Optionally clear the fields after submission
        clearFields();

    } catch (SQLException e) {
        JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Database error: " + e.getMessage(), "Error", JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE);
    }
    }                                      

    private void passActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
    }                                    

    private void jButton1ActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Welcome().setVisible(true);
        this.dispose();
    }                                        

    
     private void clearFields() {
        pl_name.setText("");
        user.setText("");
        pass.setText("");
        con_pass.setText("");
        email.setText("");
        ph_no.setText("");
        age.setText("");
        sports_type.setSelectedIndex(0);
    }
    }                 
}

VIEW LEADERBOARD : 

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel;

public class View_LeaderBoard extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form View_LeaderBoard
     */
    public View_LeaderBoard() {
        initComponents();
        loadLeaderBoard();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                                               

  private void loadLeaderBoard() {
    UserSession session = UserSession.getInstance();
    String username = session.getUsername();
    
    String sportType = null;
    
    // Fetch the sport type directly using a query
    try {
        Connection con = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7");
        String sportQuery = "SELECT SPORT_TYPE FROM PLAYERS WHERE USERNAME = ?";
        PreparedStatement sportPs = con.prepareStatement(sportQuery);
        sportPs.setString(1, username);  // Use the logged-in player's username
        
        ResultSet sportRs = sportPs.executeQuery();
        
        if (sportRs.next()) {
            sportType = sportRs.getString("SPORT_TYPE");  // Get the player's sport type
        }

        sportRs.close();
        sportPs.close();
    } catch (Exception e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
    }

    if (sportType != null) {
        DefaultTableModel model = (DefaultTableModel) leadboard.getModel();
        model.setRowCount(0);  // Clear the table

        // Fetch leaderboard data for the same sport type, summing points for each player
        try {
            Connection con = DriverManager.getConnection("jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe", "system", "cristianosui7");
            String query = "SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(POINTS) DESC) AS RANK, PLAYER_NAME, SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS " +
                           "FROM PLAYER_POINTS WHERE SPORT_TYPE = ? " +
                           "GROUP BY PLAYER_NAME " +
                           "ORDER BY TOTAL_POINTS DESC";
            PreparedStatement ps = con.prepareStatement(query);
            ps.setString(1, sportType);  // Filter by sport type
            ResultSet rs = ps.executeQuery();

            while (rs.next()) {
                Object[] row = {rs.getInt("RANK"), rs.getString("PLAYER_NAME"), rs.getInt("TOTAL_POINTS")};
                model.addRow(row);  // Add row to the leaderboard table
            }

            rs.close();
            ps.close();
            con.close();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    } else {
        System.out.println("Sport type for the player could not be found.");
    }
}


    
    

    
    private void jButton1ActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                         
        // TODO add your handling code here:
         UserSession session = UserSession.getInstance();
        String role = session.getRole();
        
        switch(role)
        {
            case "Admin":
                new Main_Page().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;
            case "User":
                new Main_Page_3().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;
            case "Player":
                new Main_Page_1().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;
            case "Team":
                new Main_Page_2().setVisible(true);
                this.dispose();
                break;    
        }
    }                                        
    }
                
}

VIEW SCHEDULE : 

package sgms;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.PreparedStatement;
import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
import java.util.Date;
import javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel;

/**
 *
 * @author VICTUS
 */
public class View_Sp_Schedule extends javax.swing.JFrame {

    /**
     * Creates new form View_Sp_Schedule
     */
    public View_Sp_Schedule() {
        initComponents();
    }

    /**
     * This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
     * WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always
     * regenerated by the Form Editor.
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    // <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">                          
    private void see_sche_typeActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                              
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        String selectedSport = sport_type.getSelectedItem().toString(); // Get the selected sport
    DefaultTableModel model = (DefaultTableModel) sche_table.getModel(); 
    model.setRowCount(0); // Clear existing rows

    try {
        // Database connection details
        String DB_URL = "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:xe";
        String DB_USER = "system";
        String DB_PASS = "cristianosui7";

        Connection conn = DriverManager.getConnection(DB_URL, DB_USER, DB_PASS);

        // Query to fetch the schedule for the selected sport
        String query = "SELECT TEAM1_ID, TEAM2_ID, VENUE, GAME_DATE " +
                       "FROM games_team " +
                       "WHERE GAME_NAME = ?";

        PreparedStatement pstmt = conn.prepareStatement(query);
        pstmt.setString(1, selectedSport); // Set the selected sport
        ResultSet rs = pstmt.executeQuery();

        // Populate the table with the fetched data
        while (rs.next()) {
            String team1 = rs.getString("TEAM1_ID");
            String team2 = rs.getString("TEAM2_ID");
            String venue = rs.getString("VENUE");
            Date gameDate = rs.getDate("GAME_DATE");
            model.addRow(new Object[]{team1, team2, venue, gameDate});
        }

        rs.close();
        pstmt.close();
        conn.close();
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
    }
    }                                             

    private void jLabel3MouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {                                     
        // TODO add your handling code here:
        new Main_Page_3().setVisible(true);  
        this.dispose();
    }                                    

        /* Create and display the form */
        java.awt.EventQueue.invokeLater(new Runnable() {
            public void run() {
                new View_Sp_Schedule().setVisible(true);
            }
        });
    }
                 
}
